center.name: Rupununi savannah
center.summary: Rupununi savannah是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Hoary-throated spinetail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits gallery forest along the watercourses, which flow through grasslands called "Lavrado" in Brazil and the Rupununi savannah in Guyana

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits gallery forest along the watercourses, which flow through grasslands called "Lavrado" in Brazil and the Rupununi savannah in Guyana
